templates.cancelBody:
Hi {{first_name}},

We regret to inform you that the event has been cancelled.

We will let you know as soon as a new date is available.

We apologise for any inconvenience.

{{owner_name}}

presentation.title: 1. About the application
presentation.p1: GolfGo is a golf event management application that allows groups of players to organise rounds, track scores, manage participation and partner preferences.
presentation.p2: For any questions, contact us at: info@golfgo.be

acceptance.title: 2. Acceptance of terms
acceptance.p1: Using GolfGo implies full acceptance of these Terms of Use. If you do not accept these terms, please do not use the application.
acceptance.p2: The publisher reserves the right to modify these terms at any time. Users will be informed of significant changes by in-app notification or email.

access.title: 3. Access and registration
access.p1: Access to GolfGo requires creating an account with a valid email address. You are responsible for keeping your credentials confidential.
access.p2: Registration is reserved for individuals aged 16 or over.
access.p3: The publisher reserves the right to suspend or delete any account in the event of a breach of these Terms.

usage.title: 4. Use of the application
usage.p1: In particular, it is prohibited to:

items.i1: Post unlawful, offensive or harmful content
items.i2: Attempt to access data from other groups or users without authorisation
items.i3: Use the application for commercial purposes without prior agreement
items.i4: Automate requests to the application without express authorisation

groups.title: 5. Groups and roles
groups.p1: GolfGo is organised around groups. Each group has an owner who manages its members, events and settings.
groups.p2: The group owner is responsible for the use made of it by the members they invite.
groups.p3: Group members can view information about other members of the same group, including their scores and playing preferences.

photos.title: 6. Content and photos
photos.p1: By publishing photos on GolfGo, you guarantee that you hold the rights to this content and authorise it to be displayed to your group members.
photos.p2: Photos are visible to all members of the associated group. They are not shared publicly.
photos.p3: You can delete your own photos at any time from the application.

availability.title: 7. Service availability
availability.p1: The publisher makes every effort to keep the application available. However, interruptions may occur for maintenance or updates.
availability.p2: The application is provided 'as is', with no guarantee of permanent availability or freedom from errors.

liability.title: 8. Limitation of liability
liability.p1: The publisher shall not be liable for any indirect damages resulting from the use or inability to use GolfGo.
liability.p2: The publisher is not responsible for content published by users or disputes that may arise between members of the same group.

law.title: 9. Applicable law
law.p1: These Terms are governed by Belgian law. In the event of a dispute, the competent courts of Belgium shall have sole jurisdiction.

controller.title: 1. Data controller
controller.p1: The data controller for personal data collected via GolfGo operates from Belgium.

items.i3: Sports data: golf scores, holes played, handicap
items.i5: Playing preferences: preferred or excluded partners
items.i6: Photos published in the context of events
items.i7: Connection data: date, time, IP address

items.i2: Organisation and management of golf events
items.i3: Calculation and display of scores and rankings
items.i6: Communication relating to your participation in events
items.i7: Application improvement and technical issue resolution

items.i1: Contract performance: account management, event participation
items.i3: Legitimate interest: service improvement, application security

sharing.title: 5. Data sharing
sharing.p1: Your data is accessible to members of your group, to the extent necessary for organising rounds.
sharing.p3: Your data is never sold or used for advertising purposes.

retention.title: 6. Retention period
retention.p1: Your data is retained for as long as your account is active.
retention.p2: If your account is deleted, your data will be deleted within 30 days.
retention.p3: Photos are deleted immediately upon request or when your account is deleted.

rights.title: 7. Your rights (GDPR)
rights.p1: Under the GDPR, you have the following rights:

items.i1: Right of access: obtain a copy of your data
items.i2: Right of rectification: correct inaccurate data
items.i3: Right to erasure: request deletion of your data
items.i4: Right to portability: receive your data in a structured format
items.i5: Right to object: object to certain processing
items.i6: Right to restriction: restrict the processing of your data

rights.p2: To exercise these rights: info@golfgo.be — Response within 30 days.
rights.p3: You may also contact the Belgian Data Protection Authority (APD): www.autoriteprotectiondonnees.be

cookies.title: 8. Cookies
cookies.p1: GolfGo only uses cookies strictly necessary for operation (authentication session). No advertising or third-party tracking cookies are used.

items.i2: Access control via Row Level Security (Supabase)
items.i4: Data access limited to members of the relevant group

updates.title: 10. Changes
updates.p1: This policy may be updated. In the event of a significant change, you will be notified by in-app notification or email.

welcome.title: How would you like to use GolfGo?
welcome.subtitle: GolfGo organises your golf outings with friends — invitations, balanced flights, scorecards, leaderboard and much more, all in one place.
welcome.playerDesc: I find all my events, sign up in one click and check my tee sheet.
welcome.ownerDesc: GolfGo handles everything — invitations, flights, tee sheets and email confirmations.
